title: Lack of Data Classification Leads to Data Leakage
description: The absence of data classification information means the system doesn't know what data it’s protecting. This creates a significant risk of exposing sensitive data to unauthorized users or systems, especially if data is transmitted without proper encryption or access controls.
affected_component: All System Components (Data Storage, Network Transmission)
attack_vector: Unencrypted data transmission, misconfigured access controls, vulnerabilities in application code exposing sensitive data.
mitigations: Implement a data classification scheme to categorize data based on its sensitivity.
Enforce encryption for all sensitive data at rest and in transit.
Implement strict access controls based on the data classification scheme.
